en.tab.label: Board
en.page.title: Board
en.config.scope_hint: These settings are saved per project.
en.config.title: Board settings
en.config.description: Changes are saved automatically and apply to all project members.
en.settings.system_columns.todo.label: To Do
en.settings.system_columns.inProgress.label: In Progress
en.settings.system_columns.done.label: Done
en.editor.title: Title
en.empty.no_columns: This project has no states yet.
en.empty.no_swimlanes_with_filter: No swimlanes match the current filter.
en.error.need_target: Choose a target state for the tasks.
en.errors.move_failed_permission: You don't have permission to move this card.
en.feature.unavailable_text: Upgrade your plan to access the board.
en.form.label: Column name
en.form.system_label_hint: Leave empty to use the default name.
en.manager.empty_note: Only the base states exist. Create custom states to tailor your workflow.
en.manager.system_hint: Base states cannot be deleted — only their name, color and WIP limit can be changed.
en.manager.title: Project States
en.modal.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the column "{{name}}"?
en.modal.delete_warning: This column has {{count}} task(s). Choose a destination state.
en.settings.behavior.global_hint: Default behavior for boards platform-wide. Users and projects can override these.
en.settings.behavior.show_assignees.hint: Small avatars of the task assignees on each card.
en.settings.behavior.show_assignees.label: Show assignees
en.settings.behavior.show_dates.hint: Start – end date range on each card.
en.settings.behavior.show_dates.label: Show dates
en.settings.behavior.show_priority.label: Show priority
en.settings.behavior.show_progress.hint: Segmented progress bar for parent tasks with subtasks.
en.settings.behavior.show_progress.label: Show progress bar
en.settings.behavior.show_subtasks.hint: When on, subtasks are rendered as individual cards on the board.
en.settings.behavior.show_subtasks.label: Show subtasks as cards
en.settings.behavior.user_hint: Your personal board behavior preferences, used across all projects unless overridden.
en.settings.card_desc: Customize how kanban cards look and behave. Project-level overrides are configured in the board's
en.settings.colors.global_hint: Default priority colors used when no user or project override is set.
en.settings.colors.user_hint: Your personal priority colors, used across all projects unless a project override is defined.
en.settings.priority.high.hint: Background color for the high-priority tag.
en.settings.priority.high.label: High priority
en.settings.priority.low.hint: Background color for the low-priority tag.
en.settings.priority.low.label: Low priority
en.settings.priority.medium.hint: Background color for the medium-priority tag.
en.settings.priority.medium.label: Medium priority
en.settings.priority.none.hint: Background color for cards without priority.
en.settings.priority.none.label: No priority
en.settings.title: Board — Configuration
en.swimlane.delete_cards_to_primary: Cards in this swimlane will be automatically moved to the "General" swimlane.
en.swimlane.delete_last_primary_warning: Removing the last swimlane will unlink all cards and return the board to no-swimlane mode.
en.swimlane.delete_warning_with_tasks: This swimlane has {{count}} task(s). Pick a target swimlane or leave empty to move them to the default swimlane.
en.swimlane.error.primary_delete_blocked: The primary swimlane cannot be removed while other swimlanes exist.
en.swimlane.form.label: Name
en.unplaced.label: Unplaced
